title: symphytum bulbosum
intro: Symphytum bulbosum, also known as bulbous comfrey, is a perennial plant in the borage family that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant contains allantoin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and healing properties, making it useful for treating wounds, bruises, and sprains. The medicinal properties of Symphytum bulbosum also provide health benefits such as reducing joint pain and inflammation, promoting bone growth, and aiding in the healing of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Symphytum bulbosum can be made into teas, tinctures, and creams, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
